acmpca.certificateauthorityactivation.Cf: The `AWS::ACMPCA::CertificateAuthorityActivation` resource creates and installs a CA certificate on a CA. If no status is specified, the `AWS::ACMPCA::CertificateAuthorityActivation` resource status defaults to ACTIVE. Once the CA has a CA certificate installed, you can use the resource to toggle the CA status field between `ACTIVE` and `DISABLED`.

acmpca.certificateauthorityactivation.Ce.Description: The Base64 PEM-encoded certificate authority certificate.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of your private CA.
The Base64 PEM-encoded certificate chain that chains up to the root CA certificate that you used to sign your private CA certificate.
